mapper.select: SELECT b.*, p.*, i.articleNo, i.imageFilename FROM product p JOIN basket b ON b.productNO = p.productNO JOIN ( SELECT imageFilename, articleNo FROM ( SELECT imageNo, articleNo, imageFilename, imageType, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY articleNo ORDER BY imageNo ASC) AS rn FROM image ) sub WHERE rn = 1 ) i ON p.productNo = i.articleNo WHERE b.memberId = #{memberId} ORDER BY b.basketUpdated ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO basket (memberId, productNo, basketProductQty, basketProductOptions, basketUpdated) VALUES ( #{memberId}, #{productNO}, #{basketProductQty}, (SELECT productOptions FROM product WHERE productNO = #{productNO}), CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
